resource_system.description: Tracks settlement resources — gold, wood, food, stone — gathered by workers from resource nodes, spent on buildings and upgrades

production_system.description: Handles building construction and worker training — queues units, spends resources, spawns completed entities at rally points

gold_system.description: Passive gold income and gold tracking — market buildings boost income rate, gold used for trade and upgrades

farming_village.description: Manages village life — crop growth cycles, villager population tracking, seasonal food production from farms and wheat fields
